zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly於1218年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德時，他的父親Maurice FitzGerald de Berminham 2nd Lord of Offaly24歲，母親Juliana Cogan19歲。他於大約1258年與Maud or Matilda de Prendergast結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1277年9月2日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德懷可福德。

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly was born in 1218, in County Wexford, Ireland, his father, Maurice FitzGerald de Berminham 2nd Lord of Offaly, was 24 and his mother, Juliana Cogan, was 19. He married Maud or Matilda de Prendergast about 1258. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 2 September 1277, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Wexford, County Wexford, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly est né en 1218, à County Wexford, Irlande, son père, Maurice FitzGerald de Berminham 2nd Lord of Offaly, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Juliana Cogan, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Maud or Matilda de Prendergast environ 1258. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 septembre 1277, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Wexford, County Wexford, Irlande.

de.Aberdare, Mid Glamorgan, Wales: Aberdare, Mid Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly 1218 in County Wexford, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maurice FitzGerald de Berminham 2nd Lord of Offaly 24 und seine Mutter Juliana Cogan 19. Er hat um 1258 Maud or Matilda de Prendergast geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. September 1277 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wexford, County Wexford, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly è nato il nel 1218 nel County Wexford, Irlanda, il suo padre, Maurice FitzGerald de Berminham 2nd Lord of Offaly, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Juliana Cogan, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Maud or Matilda de Prendergast circa 1258. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 2 settembre 1277, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Wexford, County Wexford, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offalyが1218年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードで生まれた時，父Maurice FitzGerald de Berminham 2nd Lord of Offalyは24歳，母Juliana Coganは19歳であった。約1258年にMaud or Matilda de Prendergastと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1277年9月2日に故郷で59歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードウエクスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly(이)가 1218년 아일랜드 카운티 베스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice FitzGerald de Berminham 2nd Lord of Offaly(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Cogan(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1258년 Maud or Matilda de Prendergast(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1277년 9월 2일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 베스퍼드 베스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly nasceu em 1218, em County Wexford, Irlanda, seu pai, Maurice FitzGerald de Berminham 2nd Lord of Offaly, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Cogan, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud or Matilda de Prendergast aproximadamente 1258. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1277, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Wexford, County Wexford, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice FitzMaurice 3rd Lord of Offaly родился в 1218 г. в местности коунти вексфорд, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Maurice FitzGerald de Berminham 2nd Lord of Offaly было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana Cogan, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud or Matilda de Prendergast около 1258 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 2 сентября 1277 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности вексфорд, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия.
